hero.title: Separate. Visualize. Learn.
hero.subtitle: Upload any song and Ludilo separates the instruments, generates sheet music and tablature in real time. Learn to play visually.

features.title: Everything you need to learn music

stems.title: Instrument separation
stems.description: AI that separates vocals, guitar, bass, drums and piano from any song

midi.title: MIDI conversion
midi.description: Each instrument converted to MIDI for visualization and editing

visualization.title: Piano Roll & Tablature
visualization.description: Notes falling like a game, classic sheet music or guitar tablature

mixer.title: Professional mixer
mixer.description: Control the volume of each instrument. Solo, mute, and replace with another instrument

library.title: Library of 2M+ songs
library.description: Instant access to millions of MIDIs ready to practice

speed.title: Speed control
speed.description: Slow down to practice difficult passages without changing the pitch
